calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Hui Nancy Xu, Esq. for Plaintiff Edwin Booth, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the Plaintiff's testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Robert F. Nicholson and Strategic Wave Transport, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $38,220.36
Prejudgment interest $13,650.58
Attorney's fees of $7,010.00
Costs of $548.40
For the total of $59,429.34.
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2004 Text Ruling
